nasb.text: And of every living thing of all flesh, you shall bring two of every kind into the ark, to keep them alive with you; they shall be male and female.

esv.text: And of every living thing of all flesh, you shall bring two of every sort into the ark to keep them alive with you. They shall be male and female.

cnv.text: 所有的活物，你要把每樣一對，就是一公一母，帶進方舟，好和你一同保全生命。

ccb.text: 每种动物你要带两只进方舟，雌雄各一只，好保存它们的生命。

csbs.text: 你要将一切有血肉的活物，每样一对，公母成双，带进方舟，好使它们与你一起得以存活。
